scripts.build: npm run build --workspace apps/api && npm run build --workspace apps/worker
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace apps/api && npm run lint --workspace apps/worker
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace apps/api && npm run test --workspace apps/worker
scripts.test:e2e: npm run test:e2e --workspace apps/api && npm run test:e2e --workspace apps/worker
scripts.verify: npm run build && npm run test && npm run lint
